title: rubus schleicheri subsp. inaequabilis
intro: Rubus schleicheri subsp. inaequabilis, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a subspecies of the Rubus schleicheri plant, a member of the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rubus schleicheri subsp. inaequabilis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating various digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
